resposta:
solution: ```class Solution:
    def minSteps(self, s: str, t: str) -> int:
        from collections import Counter
        cs, ct = Counter(s), Counter(t)
        return sum((cs - ct).values())
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Count character frequencies in both strings; the difference between the two counters gives the exact number of mismatched characters that must be replaced in t to match s.
